message.content:
import { Map, Swords, Trophy, Target, Shield, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react'
import { Callout } from '@/components/mdx/Callout'
import { Card, CardGrid } from '@/components/mdx/CardGrid'
import { Checklist } from '@/components/mdx/Checklist'
import { FAQ } from '@/components/mdx/FAQ'
import { Steps, Step } from '@/components/mdx/Steps'
import { Section } from '@/components/mdx/Section'
import { YouTubeEmbed } from '@/components/mdx/YouTubeEmbed'

export const metadata = {
  title: "Anime Paradox Tier List Guide: Best Units & Progression 2026",
  description: "Master Anime Paradox with our definitive tier list and guide for 2026. Discover the best DPS, support, and beginner units to dominate every stage.",
  category: "Guide",
  image: "https://placehold.co/800x400/8B5CF6/fff?text=Anime+Paradox+Tier+List",
  date: "2026-02-01",
  author: "Anime Paradox Wiki Team"
}

<Callout type="info" title="Key Takeaways">
- **Storrk** and **Zid** are the absolute top-tier DPS units, offering full-map presence and massive damage.
- **Bulma/Sprintcart** are essential early-game farm units for rapid gold acquisition.
- **Oroheme** and **Idol** provide crucial healing and buffs, vital for challenging stages.
- **Sun Jin Wu** and **Igrus** form a powerful synergy, scaling exceptionally well in longer game modes.
- **Kilawa** and **Ciel** are excellent starter units with easy evolution requirements, providing strong early game value.
- Prioritize **Legend Stages** for gem farming and to acquire **Ichigo**, a strong S-tier DPS.
</Callout>

Welcome to the definitive **Anime Paradox Tier List Guide** for 2026, your ultimate resource for mastering the game and assembling an unstoppable team. In the fast-paced world of Anime Paradox, strategic unit selection and efficient progression are paramount to success. Whether you're a newcomer looking for the best starting units or a seasoned player aiming to optimize your late-game roster, understanding the current meta is crucial. This comprehensive guide will break down the top DPS and support units, reveal effective farming strategies, and provide essential tips to ensure your journey through Anime Paradox is as smooth and powerful as possible.

<Section icon={Trophy} title="Understanding the Anime Paradox Tier List & Meta">

Navigating the vast array of units in Anime Paradox can be daunting. Our tier list categorizes units based on their overall performance, synergy, and utility across various game modes, including story, nightmare, legend, and raid stages. Units are evaluated assuming they have their best traits and evolutions, showcasing their true potential. The meta is constantly evolving, but certain units consistently rise above the rest due to their unique abilities and scaling potential.

**Video Highlights:**
- Detailed breakdown of all unit passives and best traits.
- Comprehensive meta tier list covering DPS, Support, and Farm units.
- Insights into unit synergies for optimal team composition.
- Recommendations for must-have units for progression.

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="nng_XTy8_Hk" title="Anime Paradox META Tier List (All Units & Passives) | Best Units in Roblox Anime Paradox" />

<Callout type="tip" title="Meta Insight">
Focusing on units with strong scaling or map-wide abilities is often more beneficial than units with high base damage but limited utility. Synergy between units, especially DPS and support, can drastically increase your team's effectiveness.
</Callout>

### Top-Tier DPS Units: Dominating the Battlefield

The core of any powerful team lies in its damage output. Here, we highlight the units that stand out for their ability to clear waves, decimate bosses, and carry your team through the toughest challenges.

| Unit Name | Tier | Key Strengths | Weaknesses |
| :-------- | :--- | :------------ | :--------- |
| **Storrk (Resurreccion)** | S+ | **Best overall DPS**, absurd health, range, damage; **Metralleta nuke** clears waves & heavily damages bosses. | Extremely rare, expensive to fully build. |
| **Zid (Atomic)** | S+ | **Full-map AOE DPS** once upgraded, massive tankiness, high damage ceiling. | Heavy investment, less critical for early content. |
| **Sun Jin Wu (Monarch)** | S | **Insane scaling** through kills, executes enemies, thrives in Infinite modes. | Needs time to ramp up, performs best with **Igrus**. |
| **Igrus (Elite Knight)** | S | Strong bleed damage, self-healing, **excellent synergy with SJW**, stacks damage on kill. | Lower scaling ceiling than SJW in very long runs. |
| **Ichuga (Vasto Lorde)** | S | Massive bleed DPS, strong self-sustain, tankiness, good for Legend Stages. | Can be outscaled in extended modes by SJW/Igrus. |

<Callout type="warning" title="Investment Alert">
Units like Storrk and Zid require significant investment in terms of rarity and evolution materials. While incredibly powerful, they are not easily accessible for beginners. Prioritize accessible S-tier units first.
</Callout>

### A-Tier DPS Units: Reliable & Potent

These units offer strong and reliable damage, often limited by cooldowns or specific setups but still highly effective.

| Unit Name | Tier | Key Strengths | Notes |
| :-------- | :--- | :------------ | :---- |
| **Brolu (Super)** | A | Excellent **AOE DPS** that ramps hard with kill stacks, infinite damage potential in raid/infinite. | No utility, cooldown dependent for damage doubling. |
| **Kirrua (Godspeed)** | A | High attack speed, stuns enemies, strong damage scaling, fast clear for Legend stages. | Lower base damage before buffs stack. |
| **Freezo (Full Power)** | A | Strong AOE damage with burn application, damage increases over time on map. | Long cooldowns limit consistency, requires long map presence. |
| **Sky (Enhanced)** | A | Resource meter enhances abilities, gaining 100% damage and 30% CDR for 16s. | Similar to Storrk but less damage and no summons. |
| **Ichigo** | A | **Vizor Surge** restores health and grants damage, **Getsuga Bleed** applies strong bleed, **Nuke** ability on bosses. | Obtained from Legend Stages, strong overall unit. |

</Section>

<Section icon={Shield} title="Essential Support Units: Bolstering Your Team">

Support units are the backbone of any successful Anime Paradox team, providing crucial healing, buffs, and crowd control. A well-chosen support unit can elevate your DPS units to new heights.

| Unit Name | Tier | Role | Key Abilities | Notes |
| :-------- | :--- | :--- | :------------ | :---- |
| **Sprintcart/Bulma** | S+ | **Farm Unit** | Generates massive gold. | **Mandatory** for optimal scaling and economy. Sprintcart is best, Bulma is easier to get. |
| **Idol (Pop)** | S+ | **Healer/Buffer** | AOE healing, +Damage & +CDR buffs, can extend buffs infinitely. | Requires proper placement and timing, excellent team utility. |
| **Oroheme** | S+ | **Pure Healer** | Strongest pure healer, reliable sustain, heals and does some damage. | Essential for stages requiring heavy healing, less offensive buffs than Idol. |
| **Shadow Vampire** | S | **Utility/Time Stop** | Time stop utility from Time Chamber, decent DPS. | Inconsistent activation, often outclassed by other supports. |
| **Yukura** | A | **Crowd Control** | Applies Fear (slows 40%), consumes fear to restore health. | Good starter, no evolution needed, but support abilities are niche. |
| **Steel** | A | **Shield/Buffer** | Grants 2-hit shield to allies, lowest HP ally gains +25% damage & 5-hit shield. | Good for survivability, especially for fragile DPS units. |

<Callout type="success" title="Synergy Spotlight">
Pairing **Idol (Pop)** with a high-scaling DPS unit like **Sun Jin Wu** can lead to incredibly high damage outputs due to Idol's damage and CDR buffs, potentially making buffs infinite.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Target} title="Beginner-Friendly Units & Early Progression">

Starting strong in Anime Paradox means making smart choices with your initial units and understanding the most efficient progression paths.

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Redeem Codes & Story Mode">
    Start by redeeming all available codes for free gems and resources. Immediately begin clearing **Normal Story Stages** for **250 gems** per first clear, then **Nightmare Stages** for **500 gems**.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="Acquire a Farm Unit">
    Your absolute first priority should be to get **Bulma**. She's easy to obtain (often from AFK Chamber) and is crucial for earning gold to upgrade units. If you can get **Sprintcart**, even better, but Bulma is sufficient.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="Target Easy-to-Evolve DPS Units">
    Focus on units like **Kilawa** or **Ciel** early on. **Kilawa** is highly recommended as his evolution materials (Essences) can be bought from the Merchant using gold, bypassing challenging stages. **Ciel** is also easy to evolve and offers decent stacking DPS.
  </Step>
  <Step num="4" title="Farm Legend Stages for Ichigo">
    Once you've cleared Nightmare stages, repeatedly farm **Legend Stages**. This is the most efficient way to get **100 gems per clear** and has a **2% chance** to drop **Ichigo**, an S-tier DPS unit.
  </Step>
  <Step num="5" title="Claim Milestones & Quests">
    Regularly check and claim rewards from **milestones**, **level rewards**, and **battle pass quests**. These provide significant gems, gold, and crucial trait rolls.
  </Step>
</Steps>

<Callout type="info" title="Early Unit Recommendations">
For beginners, **Megomun (Explosion)** is a great starter due to her massive burst damage and ease of acquisition (AFK Chamber). While she falls off later, she's excellent for clearing early waves. **Yuko** is also a good starter as a support unit with no evolution materials needed.
</Callout>

### Beginner Unit Overview

| Unit Name | Tier | Role | Ease of EVO | Early Game Value | Late Game Viability |
| :-------- | :--- | :--- | :---------- | :--------------- | :------------------ |
| **Ciel (Super)** | D | DPS | **Very Easy** | Good (stacks damage/HP) | Falls off quickly |
| **Megomun (Explosion)** | C | DPS | Easy | **Excellent burst** | Falls off due to long cooldowns |
| **Kilawa (Godspeed)** | A | DPS | Easy (merchant) | Excellent (fast, stuns) | Strong |
| **Bulma** | S+ | Farm | Easy | **Mandatory** | **Mandatory** |
| **Yuko** | - | Support | None | Good (support abilities) | Decent (support abilities) |

</Section>

<Section icon={Sparkles} title="Optimizing Gem & Material Farming">

Efficiently acquiring gems and evolution materials is critical for progressing and strengthening your units. Here are the best strategies:

| Farming Method | Rewards | Best For | Notes |
| :------------- | :------ | :------- | :---- |
| **First Clears (Story)** | 250-3000 Gems | Initial Gem Burst | One-time rewards from Normal, Nightmare, Legend, & Raid (Act 1-3). |
| **Legend Stages (Repeat)** | 100 Gems/Clear, Gold, EXP, Green Essence, Ichigo (2%) | **Consistent Gem & Ichigo Farming** | Most efficient repeatable gem farm, takes ~4:20 per run. |
| **Infinite Mode (Wave 6 Reset)** | 50 Gems/1:20 min | Quick, Repeated Gems | Good for fast, short farming sessions. |
| **Siege Mode (After Ichigo)** | 100 Trait Rolls/50 min | **Trait Roll Farming** | Farm after getting Ichigo and a strong team. |
| **Raid Mode (Act 3)** | San Jin Wu, High Gems | Late Game Units & Gems | Extremely difficult, requires top-tier units like Egress. |
| **Merchant Shop** | Essences, Trait Rolls | Evo Materials, Limited Trait Rolls | Buy Essences hourly. Limited 5 trait rolls per hour. |
| **Challenges (Daily/Weekly)** | Gems, Trait Rolls, EXP | Supplementary Rewards | Regular challenges are easy, daily/weekly are harder. |
| **Milestones & Battle Pass** | Gems, Trait Rolls, Gold, EXP | Progression Rewards | Claim regularly, critical for early game resources. |

<Callout type="tip" title="Egress Acquisition">
**Egress** (Siege Shop Secret) is extremely difficult and time-consuming to acquire (50,000 currency + EVO materials). Prioritize Ichigo and other strong units before committing to Egress, even though he synergizes incredibly well with Sun Jin Wu.
</Callout>

### Evolution Material Acquisition

<Checklist
  id="evo-materials"
  title="Evo Material Strategy:"
  items={[
    "Buy Essences from the Merchant using gold (hourly resets).",
    "Complete Challenges for additional Essences.",
    "Craft other Essences using Green Essences farmed from Legend Stages.",
    "Keep duplicate units for Ascension, which boosts stats (10 gems + 1000 gold).",
  ]}
/>

</Section>

<Section icon={Swords} title="FAQ">

<FAQ items={[
  {
    question: "What are the best DPS units in Anime Paradox?",
    answer: "**Storrk (Resurreccion)** and **Zid (Atomic)** are considered the strongest DPS units due to their immense damage, range, and unique abilities like full-map AOE or powerful nukes. **Sun Jin Wu (Monarch)** is also top-tier, especially when paired with **Igrus**."
  },
  {
    question: "Which support units are essential for my team?",
    answer: "**Bulma** (or Sprintcart) is absolutely essential for gold farming. **Oroheme** is the best pure healer, while **Idol (Pop)** provides AOE healing along with crucial damage and CDR buffs, making both highly valuable depending on the stage requirements."
  },
  {
    question: "How can I farm gems quickly in Anime Paradox?",
    answer: "After completing all first clears from Normal, Nightmare, and Legend stages, the most efficient repeatable method is farming **Legend Stages** for **100 gems per clear**. Alternatively, resetting **Infinite Mode** on Wave 6 yields 50 gems every 1 minute 20 seconds."
  },
  {
    question: "Are beginner units worth investing in for the long term?",
    answer: "Beginner units like **Megomun** and **Ciel** are excellent for early progression due to their ease of acquisition and evolution. However, they generally fall off in late-game content compared to Mythic, Secret, and Paradox units. Units like **Kilawa** offer better long-term value while still being beginner-friendly."
  }
]} />

</Section>
